creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
garga       2007-09-04 13:18:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    .                    UPDATING 
    mail                 Makefile 
    mail/qmail-scanner   Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    mail/qmail-scanner/files patch-configure 
    mail/qmail-scanner1  Makefile 
  Added files:
    mail/qmail-scanner/files pkg-install.in pkg-message.in 
  Removed files:
    mail/qmail-scanner   pkg-install pkg-message 
    mail/qmail-scanner/files patch-qmail-scanner-queue.template 
                             patch-sub-spamassassin.pl 
  Log:
  - Upgrade qmail-scanner to 2.01
  - Repocopy qmail-scanner to mail/qmail-scanner1 to preserver 1.x version
  
  I made a big confusion here, i forgot i have transfered maintainership of
  qmail-scanner to jmelo@, and I took the PR and did all the job.
  I explained to jmelo@ and he approved all these changes.
  
  PR:             ports/115877
  Submitted by:   Felippe de Meirelles Motta <lippe@freebsdbrasil.com.br>
  Approved by:    jmelo (maintainer)
  Repocopied by:  marcus
